support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Get help, find answers, or submit a ticket
support.faq1A: You earn 50% recurring commission on every membership your referrals pay — every month they stay active. You also earn from the 8-tier campaign grid (40% direct + 6.25% across 8 uni-level tiers) and course sales. Share your referral link to get started.
support.faq2A: Watch & Earn is the engine that powers the campaign tier grid. When you watch videos, you deliver real views to other members' campaign tiers. This keeps their campaigns active and their commission qualification alive. It is not a standalone earning feature — it is the mechanism that makes the entire affiliate commission structure work.
support.faq3A: Each campaign tier has a grid of 36 positions. Uni-level commissions pay up to 8 levels. When members purchase a tier, they fill positions in their sponsor's grid and commissions flow. When a grid completes (36 members), the owner receives a completion bonus (up to $3,600) and a new grid opens automatically. You can repurchase tiers to reactivate your qualification and keep earning.
support.faq4A: Withdrawals are paid in USDT on the Polygon blockchain. You need to complete KYC verification (one-time) and have 2FA enabled. Minimum withdrawal is $10. Go to Wallet and request a payout.
support.faq5A: Partner membership is $20/month, with the first 100 active members getting the Founding rate of $15/month locked for life. Every active member gets the full toolkit: AI content tools (Creative Studio, Content Creator, SuperDeck, banner/meme/QR generators, Niche Finder) and builder tools (SuperPages, LinkHub, Link Tools, AutoResponder, Lead Finder, ProSeller).
support.faq6A: Share your personal referral link: www.superadpro.com/join/[your-username]. You can find it on your dashboard, in Social Share, or generate a QR code for it in the QR Generator. Anyone who signs up through your link becomes your direct referral.

cryptoGuide.title: USDT Wallet Guide
cryptoGuide.subtitle: Set up your wallet in 5 minutes
cryptoGuide.heroSubtitle: Even if you have never used crypto before
cryptoGuide.heroDesc: SuperAdPro pays commissions and accepts payments in USDT — a digital dollar. This guide walks you through choosing a network, getting a wallet, and getting ready to use SuperAdPro.
cryptoGuide.step1P1: USDT (Tether) is a stablecoin — every USDT is worth one US dollar. It moves at the speed of the internet, with no banks and no business hours. SuperAdPro uses USDT for everything: paying for memberships and tiers, and receiving your commissions.
cryptoGuide.step1P2: USDT can be sent on several different networks. SuperAdPro uses BEP-20 (BNB Chain) — a fast, low-cost network supported by every major wallet and exchange. The dollar amount stays the same regardless of network; only the road changes.
cryptoGuide.step2P1: BEP-20 (BNB Chain) is the network we use. It is fast (a few seconds per transfer), cheap (under $1 in fees), and supported by every major wallet and exchange.
cryptoGuide.step2P2: If you already have USDT on a different network like TRC-20 (Tron) or ERC-20 (Ethereum), you can swap or bridge it to BEP-20 inside most exchanges and wallets. Binance, MetaMask, and Trust Wallet all do this in a few clicks.
cryptoGuide.step3P1: A wallet is an app that holds your USDT. It is free and takes minutes to set up. The wallet you choose depends on the network you picked in Step 2.
cryptoGuide.step3P2: Use MetaMask, Trust Wallet, or your Binance account directly — any wallet that supports USDT on BNB Chain (BEP-20) will work. When you create a wallet, you will be shown a 12-word recovery phrase.
cryptoGuide.step3Tip: Once your wallet is set up, copy your wallet address — it starts with 0x and is 42 characters long. You will paste this into SuperAdPro under Account → Withdrawal Wallet so commissions can be sent to you.
cryptoGuide.step3Warning: Write your 12-word recovery phrase on paper and store it somewhere safe. Never share it with anyone. Anyone with these 12 words can take all your funds. Not even SuperAdPro support will ever ask for it.
cryptoGuide.step4Title: Buy USDT and send to your wallet
cryptoGuide.step4P1: You can buy USDT on any major exchange — Binance, Kraken, Coinbase, KuCoin, OKX. Buy the amount you want and choose to withdraw it to your wallet.
cryptoGuide.step4P2: When you withdraw, the exchange will ask which network to use. Always choose BEP-20 (BNB Chain) — this matches the network SuperAdPro uses. Sending on the wrong network means your funds will not arrive.
cryptoGuide.step4Warning: Sending USDT on the wrong network can result in the loss of funds. Always check the network on both ends — your exchange and your wallet — before confirming the send.
cryptoGuide.step4Tip: BEP-20 transfers cost less than $1 in BNB (BNB Chain's native token). Most exchanges handle the gas for you automatically when you withdraw.
cryptoGuide.step5P1: Your wallet is now set up. Open SuperAdPro, go to Account → Withdrawal Wallet, choose the matching network, and paste your wallet address. From this point on, every commission you earn is sent directly to your wallet.
cryptoGuide.step5P2: No payment processor can freeze your funds. No banks involved. Your money, your wallet, your control.
cryptoGuide.securityDesc: No payment processor can freeze your funds. Commissions pay out directly to your wallet — no middleman, no business hours.

help.title: SuperLeads Help
help.subtitle: Complete guide to your CRM & autoresponder

items.title: What is SuperLeads?
items.desc: SuperLeads is your built-in CRM and email autoresponder. Capture leads from funnels or imports, organise them into lists, send broadcasts, and nurture them with automated email sequences — all from one place.

items.title: What counts as a lead?
items.desc: Any email address you've captured — through a SuperPages funnel, a manual entry, or a CSV import. Each lead has a status, an optional name, a source tag, and can be assigned to any list.

items.title: Free emails vs boost credits
items.desc: Every account gets 200 free email sends per day. Need more? Buy boost packs from the Boost tab — credits never expire and come from your wallet balance.

items.title: Lead storage limit
items.desc: Pro members can store up to 5,000 leads. Above that, either delete old leads or upgrade your plan. Leads stay forever unless you delete them.

items.title: Lead statuses
items.desc: New, Nurturing, Hot, Converted, and Unsubscribed. Set a status manually or let sequences update it automatically when a lead takes action.

items.title: Editing a lead
items.desc: Click any lead row to expand and edit name, email, status, or list assignment. Changes save instantly.

items.title: Deleting a lead
items.desc: Click the trash icon next to any lead. Deleted leads free up storage and cannot be recovered.

items.title: Bulk operations
items.desc: Select multiple leads via the checkbox column, then use the bulk action bar at the bottom to move them to a list, change status, or delete.

items.title: What are lists?
items.desc: Lists are tags you apply to leads to group them — for example 'Fitness Newsletter' or 'Crypto Prospects'. A single lead can belong to multiple lists.

items.title: Creating a list
items.desc: Click 'Create List' in the Leads tab sidebar. Name it something descriptive — you'll target sequences and broadcasts by list.

items.title: List analytics
items.desc: Each list shows total leads, active subscribers, and conversion rate. Use these to identify which audiences engage best.

items.title: What is a sequence?
items.desc: A sequence is an ordered set of emails sent automatically on a delay after a lead joins. Use them for welcome flows, product launches, or nurture campaigns.

items.title: Creating a sequence
items.desc: Switch to the Sequences tab, click 'New Sequence', and add email steps with send delays (in days). Assign the sequence to one or more lists.

items.title: AI-generated sequences
items.desc: Click 'Generate with AI' and enter your niche. SuperLeads writes a 5-email welcome series tailored to your audience. Edit any email before activating.

items.title: Pausing and resuming
items.desc: Toggle a sequence off to pause all future sends. Leads already in progress stay paused; new leads won't enter. Toggle back on to resume.

items.title: What is a broadcast?
items.desc: A one-off email sent immediately (or scheduled) to a list. Use broadcasts for time-sensitive news, offers, or updates that don't fit a sequence.

items.title: Writing a broadcast
items.desc: Choose the target list, write a subject line and body (HTML supported), then preview. Send immediately or schedule for later.

items.title: Broadcast cost
items.desc: Each recipient counts as one send against your daily limit. If you exceed 200 sends, the rest come from boost credits.

items.title: Accepted formats
items.desc: CSV file upload or paste a list of email addresses. The format is simple: one email per line, or 'email,name' for named leads.

items.title: Import settings
items.desc: Before confirming, choose the target list, initial status, and optional source tag. Duplicates within the same list are skipped automatically.

items.title: Auto-assigning a sequence
items.desc: Tick 'Auto-assign sequence' to drop every imported lead straight into a welcome flow. Great for transferring leads from another platform.

items.title: Preview and validation
items.desc: After upload, review the preview. Invalid emails are flagged red and won't import. Fix your source file and re-upload if needed.

items.title: What are boost credits?
items.desc: Extra email sends beyond your 200/day free allocation. Credits come from your wallet balance and never expire.

items.title: Boost pack tiers
items.desc: Four pack sizes — 500, 2,000, 10,000, and 50,000 credits. Larger packs give better per-email pricing.

items.title: When to buy boosts
items.desc: When sending a large broadcast, nurturing a list bigger than 200 leads, or running multiple active sequences. The platform warns you before you hit your daily cap.

publicPages.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before joining.
publicPages.refundPolicy: All purchases are final and non-refundable.
publicPages.incomeDisclaimer: Income examples shown on this platform are illustrative only. Individual results vary.
publicPages.termsContent1: By using SuperAdPro, you agree to these terms. SuperAdPro is a video advertising and affiliate marketing platform. Members earn commissions by referring others and participating in campaign grids.
publicPages.earningsDisclaimerContent: Participation in the platform involves financial risk and should be treated as a business venture. Past performance of other members is not indicative of your own results.
publicPages.membershipCommContent: Members earn $10/month flat for every active referral. Commission pays every month the referred member stays active. No caps, no tier-based rate splits.
publicPages.upgradePolicyContent: Under flat-pricing (locked 15 May 2026), all paid members are on a single tier (Partner, $20/mo, or Founding for the first 100 at $15/mo locked). Tier upgrades have been retired; if you previously held a legacy Basic or Pro membership and have questions about your commissions or status, contact support.
publicPages.campaignTierCommContent: Campaign tier purchases are split as follows: 40% to the direct sponsor, 50% distributed across 8 uni-level tiers (6.25% each), 5% to the grid completion bonus pool, and 5% to the platform. Commission qualification requires an active membership and completion of daily Watch to Earn requirements.
publicPages.campaignViewContent: Each campaign tier includes a set number of video views delivered by the Watch & Earn community. Once the view target has been achieved, the campaign completes. Members may repurchase the same tier to reactivate their commission qualification and submit a new video ad. Grids reactivate automatically upon completion — when a grid reaches 36 members, the completion bonus is paid and a new grid opens. This creates a long-term recurring income opportunity through ongoing repurchase and grid reactivation.
publicPages.courseCommContent: Course sales follow a 100% pass-up system. Sales 1, 3, 5, and 7 are kept by the seller. Sales 2, 4, 6, and 8 pass up to the sponsor in the commission chain.
publicPages.platformRightsContent: SuperAdPro reserves the right to modify, adjust, or update the following at any time, with or without prior notice, in order to maintain the integrity, fairness, and sustainability of the platform:
publicPages.rightsViewTargets: Campaign view targets — the number of views required per campaign tier may be adjusted based on community size and ad-delivery capacity.
publicPages.rightsCommRates: Commission rates and structures — including but not limited to referral percentages, grid commission splits, pass-up patterns, and qualification requirements.
publicPages.rightsMembership: Membership pricing and tier features — including the addition, removal, or modification of platform tools and capabilities included in each tier.
publicPages.rightsPolicies: Platform policies and operational rules — including but not limited to acceptable use policies, withdrawal thresholds, KYC requirements, and content moderation standards.
publicPages.rightsNotice: Any significant changes to commission structures or campaign view targets will be communicated via email and platform notification at least 7 days in advance.
publicPages.privacyContent1: We collect the minimum data necessary to operate the platform - your name, email, and payment information. We use Brevo for email and Cloudflare for security.
publicPages.privacyContent2: We do not sell your data to third parties. We use industry-standard encryption for all sensitive data including KYC documents.
publicPages.acceptableUseContent: Members may not use SuperAdPro to promote illegal products or services, distribute malware, harvest user data, or engage in deceptive marketing practices. Violation may result in account termination.
publicPages.cryptoPaymentsContent: All earnings are paid in USDT on the Polygon blockchain. Cryptocurrency transactions are irreversible. SuperAdPro is not responsible for losses due to incorrect wallet addresses or network errors.
publicPages.kycIntro: SuperAdPro is required to verify the identity of members before processing withdrawals. This helps prevent fraud, comply with international anti-money laundering regulations, and protect the community.
publicPages.kycDocuments: Full legal name, date of birth, and a government-issued photo ID - passport, driving licence, or national ID card.
publicPages.kycUseContent: Your documents are used solely to verify your identity and comply with regulatory requirements. They are never shared with other members or third parties.
publicPages.kycStoreContent: Documents are encrypted and stored securely in Cloudflare R2 object storage. Access is restricted to authorised administrators only.
publicPages.kycRightsContent: You have the right to request access to your personal data, request corrections, or request deletion of your KYC documents at any time by contacting support.
publicPages.kycProcessingContent: KYC applications are typically reviewed within 24-48 hours. You will be notified via email once your verification is approved or if additional documents are required.
publicPages.amlContent1: SuperAdPro is committed to preventing money laundering and the financing of terrorism. We implement appropriate controls to detect and report suspicious activity.
publicPages.amlContent2: We monitor transactions for suspicious activity and reserve the right to freeze accounts, refuse withdrawals, and report suspicious activity to relevant authorities.
publicPages.amlContent3: Members are prohibited from using SuperAdPro to launder funds, obscure the origins of funds, or conduct transactions on behalf of sanctioned individuals or entities.
publicPages.readyToAdvertiseDesc: Create a free account and launch your first campaign today.
publicPages.faqA1: Yes — registering is completely free. You pay $20/month for Partner membership to activate your earning ability and unlock the full toolkit. The first 100 active members get the Founding rate of $15/month locked for life.
publicPages.faqA2: Commissions are credited to your platform wallet instantly when they're earned. You can withdraw to your crypto wallet at any time, subject to a minimum withdrawal threshold.
publicPages.faqA3: Partner membership ($20/mo) gives you full affiliate earnings, campaign grid access, your affiliate link, all 13 platform tools (AI content + builder), and full commission earning across every income stream.
publicPages.faqQ4: Do I have to recruit people to earn?
publicPages.faqA4: Not exclusively. While referring others accelerates income through membership commissions, you also earn grid completion bonuses driven by your whole team's activity — not just people you personally recruited.
publicPages.faqQ5: How does the campaign grid work?
publicPages.faqA5: Each campaign tier has a 6×6 grid with 36 positions. As members across your network join that tier, positions fill. When all 36 fill, a completion bonus is triggered and paid to the grid owner. A single campaign can complete multiple times.
publicPages.faqA6: When anyone in your network (up to 8 levels deep) makes a grid purchase, you earn 6.25% of that purchase automatically. The size and activity level of your network determine how often these commissions trigger — earnings are not guaranteed and depend on members below you choosing to participate.
publicPages.faqQ7: What currency are earnings paid in?
publicPages.faqA7: All earnings are in USDT (a dollar-pegged stablecoin) paid on the Polygon blockchain. You need a compatible crypto wallet to receive payouts.
publicPages.faqA8: When you sell a course, you earn a direct commission. Every 3rd sale passes up to your sponsor — who earns a larger commission. This creates a powerful incentive chain.
publicPages.faqQ9: Is there a lock-in period for membership?
publicPages.faqA9: No. Membership is billed monthly with no contract. You can cancel at any time, though your earnings will stop when membership lapses.
publicPages.faqA10: Members can access support through the platform's help system. You can also reach us through the contact page.
publicPages.advertiserDesc: SuperAdPro members watch videos as part of earning campaigns. Your ads get genuine attention from motivated viewers.

items.title: What is SuperPages?
items.desc: A drag-and-drop builder for landing pages, opt-in funnels, and sales pages. Every page is mobile-responsive and can capture leads directly into SuperLeads.

items.title: The canvas
items.desc: The centre area is your page. Drag blocks from the left sidebar to add them. Click any element to edit it in the right panel.

items.title: Saving your work
items.desc: Changes save automatically as you edit. The 'Publish' button makes your latest version live at your chosen URL.

items.title: Pages vs funnels
items.desc: A single page works for simple opt-ins. A funnel is a sequence of pages (opt-in → thank you → offer) — use the funnel builder to create multi-step flows.

items.title: Heading block
items.desc: For page titles and section headers. Pick H1 through H6, adjust size and weight, and choose a colour. H1 should be used once per page for SEO.

items.title: Paragraph block
items.desc: For body copy. Supports bold, italic, links, and line breaks. Use short paragraphs (2-3 sentences) for best readability on mobile.

items.title: Quote block
items.desc: A highlighted quote or testimonial with an optional attribution line. Styled distinctly from normal paragraphs.

items.title: List block
items.desc: Bulleted or numbered lists. Use bulleted lists for features and benefits; numbered lists for steps or ranked items.

items.title: Image block
items.desc: Upload an image or paste a URL. Images auto-resize to fit the container width and load lazily for fast page speed.

items.title: Video block
items.desc: Paste a YouTube, Vimeo, or Wistia URL. The player embeds responsively and plays directly on your page. No custom hosting needed.

items.title: Audio block
items.desc: Embed an MP3 player. Upload the file or paste a direct URL. Great for podcast episodes or voice messages.

items.title: Gallery block
items.desc: A grid of images that opens in a lightbox on click. Add up to 24 images per gallery.

items.title: Button block
items.desc: A clickable button with custom text, colour, and action. Set it to open a URL, scroll to a section, or submit a form.

items.title: Form block
items.desc: Collect name, email, and custom fields. Submissions drop directly into SuperLeads with your chosen list and status.

items.title: Countdown timer
items.desc: Drives urgency by showing time until a launch, deadline, or offer expiry. Choose a target date/time and styling.

items.title: Opt-in popup
items.desc: A lightbox form triggered by exit intent, scroll depth, or a time delay. Great for capturing leaving visitors.

items.title: FAQ block
items.desc: A collapsible question-and-answer list. Reduces page clutter and boosts SEO — search engines understand FAQ schema.

items.title: Testimonial block
items.desc: Customer quotes with optional avatars, names, and star ratings. Displays as cards, a carousel, or a grid.

items.title: Pricing table
items.desc: Compare 2-4 pricing tiers side-by-side with feature lists and a call-to-action button per tier.

items.title: Stats block
items.desc: Big numbers with labels — e.g. '10,000+ members', '$2M paid out'. Use to build credibility quickly.

items.title: Section block
items.desc: A container that groups other blocks together. Add a background colour, image, or gradient to style entire sections of your page.

items.title: Columns
items.desc: Split a section into 2, 3, or 4 columns. On mobile, columns automatically stack vertically for readability.

items.title: Spacer block
items.desc: Adds vertical whitespace between elements. Use sparingly — too much whitespace fragments the page flow.

items.title: Divider block
items.desc: A horizontal line to separate sections visually. Choose thickness, colour, and style (solid, dashed, dotted).

items.title: Page URL
items.desc: Set a custom slug under your affiliate subdomain. Keep URLs short, descriptive, and keyword-rich for SEO.

items.title: SEO meta
items.desc: Set the page title, meta description, and social share image. These show in search results and when your link is shared on social media.

items.title: Publishing
items.desc: Click 'Publish' to make your latest changes live. Draft changes stay private until you publish — you can preview anytime.

items.title: Analytics
items.desc: Track page views, opt-in rate, and average time on page. Data updates every 5 minutes.

items.title: Tracking pixels
items.desc: Inject Facebook, Google, or TikTok pixels to track conversions in your ad platforms. Add your pixel ID in the page settings.

items.title: What does the AI do?
items.desc: Generates copy for headlines, body paragraphs, CTAs, and FAQs based on your niche and offer. Great for beating blank-page paralysis.

items.title: Writing a good prompt
items.desc: Be specific: include your product, your audience, the action you want them to take, and the tone. 'Write a headline for a fitness course aimed at busy mums' beats 'write a headline'.

items.title: Editing AI output
items.desc: AI drafts are starting points, not final copy. Always read, tweak, and inject your own voice before publishing.

items.title: Regenerate vs refine
items.desc: 'Regenerate' gives a fresh take with the same prompt. 'Refine' takes the current output and tweaks it — use refine when you're close but not quite there.

items.title: Use your own domain
items.desc: Serve your published pages from a domain you own (e.g. pages.yourbrand.com) instead of superadpro.com/p/yourname/.... One DNS setup, unlimited pages. Free for active members.

items.title: How it works
items.desc: You add two DNS records at your provider — one CNAME and one TXT — and we automatically issue a Let's Encrypt SSL certificate via Railway. No Cloudflare required. Your published pages become accessible at your URL within ~15 minutes. Original superadpro.com URLs keep working too — no broken links.

items.title: What you need
items.desc: A domain you own (~$10/year from any registrar) and an active SuperAdPro membership. About 10 minutes for first-time setup, including DNS propagation. HTTPS is automatic — we handle the SSL certificate for you.

items.title: Common pitfalls
items.desc: Use a CNAME, not an A record. Use a subdomain like pages.yourbrand.com, not the root domain. If you use Cloudflare, set the CNAME proxy status to grey cloud (DNS only) — NOT orange (Proxied), which breaks HTTPS. Full troubleshooting is on the Custom Domain page itself.

forAdvertisers.sectionTag: § 05 / Watch & Earn — the engine that powers the network
forAdvertisers.card1Sub: Views come from real members watching 30 seconds end-to-end — not bots, not auto-play in a hidden tab, not "impressions" counted the second a pixel touches the screen.
forAdvertisers.card2Sub: Every viewer is an active network or affiliate marketer — someone who joined specifically to earn online. You're not explaining the category. You're showing your offer.
forAdvertisers.card3Sub: The people watching are often the same people advertising. That's why the audience stays engaged — they know what it feels like to need eyeballs on a pitch, because they need them too.
forAdvertisers.card4Sub: Country breakdown. Hourly heatmap. Completion rate. Click-through to your site. Real numbers on real humans — not vanity metrics dressed up as insight.
forAdvertisers.whyHeadline: One system. Two roles. Everyone wins.
forAdvertisers.whySub: Watch-to-Earn isn't a side feature of SuperAdPro — it's what makes the whole thing work. Members watch short videos and keep their qualification active. Advertisers get their pitch in front of a focused audience of networkers and affiliates. The loop feeds itself.
forAdvertisers.why1Title: Members watch. They qualify. They earn.
forAdvertisers.why1Desc: A few minutes a day keeps a member's qualification alive and their commissions flowing. The watching isn't a chore — it's how members stay plugged into the network that's paying them, and it's how they discover new offers before anyone else.
forAdvertisers.why2Title: Campaigns get real views. Real attention.
forAdvertisers.why2Desc: Active tier from $20 to $1,000. Between 2,000 and 170,000 views per cycle depending on tier. Targeting by country, niche, age, and gender from Advanced tier 4 and up. Every view is a full 30 seconds — no bounce, no skip, no fake.
forAdvertisers.why3Title: The same people, in both roles.
forAdvertisers.why3Desc: Most members eventually run a campaign. Most advertisers started as watchers. That's the flywheel — and it's why the attention stays high, the commissions keep compounding, and the platform gets sharper every cycle instead of cheaper.
forAdvertisers.earnCardDesc: A few minutes a day keeps your qualification active and your commissions flowing. Watch to the end to count — no skipping, no autoplay in a tab. You're the audience that makes the platform valuable, and you get paid to stay.
forAdvertisers.earnCardBullets:
• Keep qualification alive daily
  • Few minutes — not hours
  • Must watch to end to count
  • Discover new offers first
forAdvertisers.reachCardTitle: Your pitch. In front of networkers.
forAdvertisers.reachCardDesc: Activate a campaign tier from $20 to $1,000 and get 2,000 to 170,000 real 30-second views per cycle. Submit a 30-second video from YouTube, Rumble, or Vimeo. Add targeting at Advanced tier 4 and up. Track CTR, country, time-of-day — then repurchase and scale what works.
forAdvertisers.reachCardBullets:
• $20 to $1,000 tier range
  • 2,000–170,000 views/cycle
  • YouTube / Rumble / Vimeo
  • Targeting at Advanced tier 4+
forAdvertisers.flowHeadSub: From submit to cycle-complete — four stages, fully automated, fully transparent.
forAdvertisers.step1Desc: Paste a YouTube, Rumble, or Vimeo link. Set your title, category, and optional CTA URL. Activate a tier from $20 to $1,000.
forAdvertisers.step2Desc: Members watch the full 30 seconds to earn their commission — and that's your view. Real humans, real attention, real completion.
forAdvertisers.step3Desc: Country breakdown. Hourly heatmap. Click-through rate. Daily velocity. See where your views come from and when they land.
forAdvertisers.step4Desc: When your cycle completes, repurchase the tier to keep views flowing — or step up to a higher tier for more reach and better targeting.
forAdvertisers.footerLine1: Watch-to-Earn is part of every SuperAdPro membership.
forAdvertisers.footerLine2: Both sides of the table, one system.

hero.promiseLabel: Maximum per cycle · All 8 tiers active
hero.promiseSub: Real platform math · The ceiling is real · Getting there is on you
hero.sub: Every campaign tier activates a fresh 64-seat grid. Directs seed it. Spillover fills it. Completion pays the bonus. Four grids running together makes money. Eight makes freedom.

section1.title: The grid, in action.
section1.sub: Below is exactly how your grid fills over time. Your directs seed it. Spillover from your sponsor's team fills the rest. When the 64th seat locks in, the completion bonus drops. Watch once. You'll see why this works.

caption.you: You activate your tier — the grid opens
caption.directs: Your directs seed the first row
caption.spillover: Spillover starts flowing in from above
caption.fills: The grid fills from every direction

section2.title: How the 36 seats
section2.sub: Three things happen, in order. Every grid. Every tier. No exceptions.

mechanic.step1Desc: When you refer someone and they activate the same tier as you, they take a seat in your grid. That's how the first few seats get filled — by the people you personally brought in. Every direct pays you 40% of the tier price instantly.
mechanic.step2DescPre: When your directs refer their own people — and when overflow comes from your sponsor's team above you — those seats drop into your grid. Most of your 36 seats come from
mechanic.step3Desc: When the final seat locks in, the grid completes. A lump-sum bonus drops into your wallet — 10% of the total seat value across all 36 members. Then a fresh grid opens and the cycle begins again.

section3.title: Pick your tier.
section3.sub: Choose a tier. Set your activity level. Watch the math. Every number is pulled directly from the platform — nothing inflated.

calc.refsLabel: Your direct referrals in this grid
calc.annualSub: Tiers stack when activated together · Real platform math

term.spilloverDef: When someone above or below you in the structure refers more people than they need, those extra members "spill over" into your grid — filling your seats and earning you uni-level commissions.
term.unilevelDef: A small commission paid to you for every seat in your grid that's filled by someone other than your direct referrals — typically from spillover. 6.25% of the tier price per seat.

section4.title: This is not a shortcut.
section4.titleAccent: It's a system that rewards real work.
section4.p1: No grid fills itself. Spillover only happens when the people above and below you are actively referring. If your upline is quiet and your downline is quiet, your grid sits there and nothing happens.
section4.p2: The grid is a powerful engine — but it's still an engine. It needs fuel. Your activity, your network, your consistency. Put those in, the math works. Don't, and the math tells you exactly the same thing every month: zero.
section4.keyText: Show up, bring people in, stay consistent. The grid takes care of the rest.

explainer.p1Post: . Activate at one of 8 tier levels ($20 → $1,000), and your video runs on the SuperAdPro Watch & Earn page — where members watch daily to earn rewards. Real eyes, every day, on autopilot.
explainer.p2: While your video drives traffic to your offer, your tier opens a 36-seat grid that fills with referrals from you and spillover from your team — paying direct commissions, uni-level commissions, and a completion bonus when all 36 seats fill.
explainer.buyingText: Guaranteed video ad views from an engaged member audience, plus a grid position that pays out as it fills.
explainer.tiersText: Each tier opens its own grid. To earn from a referral's purchase at a given tier, you must own that tier yourself. Buy higher tiers as you grow — own all 8 and you earn on every purchase your team makes.

honest.p1Mid2: , for every active member you refer. Two referrals and your own subscription is covered — you're on SuperAdPro free. Ten re
honest.p1Post: — a bill paid, a car payment covered, a credit card cleared. Every referral after that is pure profit that doesn't stop until they do.

cta.title: Your first referral is one conversation away.

hero.sub: Your referrals buy credit packs to use the AI Creative Studio. You earn on every single pack they buy — down three levels deep. Own all 8 packs yourself and you have 8 independent Nexuses filling in parallel.

section1.headlineBreak: Not based on where they land in the Nexus.
section1.sub: Every person who buys a credit pack pays commission somewhere in your Nexus. The rate isn't decided by what level they fall into — it's decided by who recruited them. Anyone you personally brought in pays you 15%, wherever they land. Anyone brought in by your team pays you 10%, wherever they land. When all 39 positions have bought, your matrix resets and a fresh cycle begins.
section1.legendDirectDesc: Anyone you personally recruited. Rate applies no matter which level they land in.
section1.legendSpilloverDesc: Anyone recruited by your team. Rate applies no matter which level they land in.
section1.captionPhase3: › You bring a 4th — they spill to Level 3 but still pay 15%.
section1.box1Desc: The top row of your Nexus. Fills first with anyone you or your team bring in.
section1.box2Desc: The middle layer. Three positions under each Level 01 slot.
section1.box3Desc: The deepest row. Three positions under each Level 02 slot — 27 in total.
section1.summaryText: When your Nexus fills with 39 purchases, you earn a 10% completion bonus on the total Nexus value — and a fresh one opens for that pack.

section2.headlineBreak: Every pack has its own Nexus.
section2.sub: Each pack unlocks credits for the AI Creative Studio — video, images, music, voiceover, and more. Own all 8 and you have 8 independent Nexuses filling in parallel, each paying commissions on its own pack's purchases.

section3.sub: Every Nexus starts the same way — you buy the pack, you earn 15% on everyone you personally bring in, and 10% on anyone they bring in. The question is how far the structure fills.

partial.label: Partial fill
partial.desc: 3 directs, 9 spillover. You’ve earned 15% on every direct, plus 10% on every spillover — paid in credits you can use or withdraw.

mid.label: Mid fill
mid.desc: Twelve positions filled across Levels 1 and 2. At this point, credits earned typically cover the pack price several times over.

full.label: Full cycle
full.desc: All 39 positions filled. Your 35% share materialises as credits to withdraw, plus a 10% completion bonus paid on the full Nexus value.

section3.close: The structure rewards activity, not enrolment. If you bring people in and they bring people in, your Nexus fills. If no one moves, nothing moves. That’s the trade.

section4.headline: Ready when you are.
section4.sub: Pick a pack. Share it. Let the structure work.

explainer.headline: What am I actually buying?
explainer.subtitle: Creator Credits
explainer.p1Pre: Creator Credits are a pack of
explainer.p1Post: used in Creative Studio to generate videos, images, music, voiceovers, lip-sync clips, and more — perfect for creating content for your campaigns or your business.
